reviews.review_text: Nos quedamos 3 noches y no podriamos haber estado mas comodos. Las instalaciones estan muy bien cuidadas, personal muy amable y el camping es tranquilo. No nos queriamos ir. Volveremos!
Wir hatten ein sehr cooles Mobile Home - sehr entspannt. 20 Minuten zu Fuß im Zentrum, einen Markt gibt es in unmittelbarer Nähe. Empfehlenswert!
Great park, friendly staff. Grounds well kept. Definitely worth a visit
The blanket so smelly, and looks like the never wash it.
Comfy enough but the rooms are a little dated. Daughter loved the play area which was right outside our door. Nice people in the reception area

Outstanding welcoming staff. Love Sarah!
Really pet friendly. Regular food vans for dinner options. Permant coffee van open 7-10 am, seven days a week :)
Roomy sites, lots of leafy privacy screens. Catch a bus for a 5 minute trip to Airlie. Easy walk to town in 20 minutes.
免費的鸚鵡餵食秀、每天還會有Food truck、地方很大，雖然人很多，但浴室和公共空間都非常乾淨

We checked in without a reservation. Spots and glamping were available. Bathrooms were clean, pool was relaxing, power and water hook up were easy and Tas, our counter person was absolutely fantastic. Two nights here were great.

Présence de cafards dans tout notre bungalow, l’équipe n’a rien fait de plus et ne nous ont pas considéré, n’ont pas été surpris quand on leur a annoncé…
Excentré du centre de Airlie Beach.

Shout out to this place and it’s workers.
I did not stay here but it was my pick up point for my air Whitsundays experience. I’ve received a messsage informing me that my shuttle was over 40 mins late and asked if i could wait inside cause as we all know it not only humid but stinky hot and honestly i was expecting a no for an answer but to my surprise they said yes!!!
they were quite busy with a lot of check ins but it was lovely to see the staff laughing and enjoying themselfs, making jokes between customers.
Definitely seems a nice place to work and a nice place to stay in!

Amazing, friendly reception staff. The room had a big bathroom with a decent shower and clean bedding. There’s also a small coffee kiosk open in the morning next to reception, which is a nice touch.
They seem to organise different events every day. We were only there for two days, but during that time they had a Thai food caravan and a bird-feeding activity, which was a nice extra.
The place felt quite worn and could really do with a deep clean - curtains could
Do with a wash and it was quite dusty in some areas.

Vi bookede online - hvilket er let. Venlig og imødekommende personale ved indcheckning.
Vi havde egen motorhome med og fik en fin plads med lidt skygge.
Pladsen var flot, velholdt og godt indrettet.
Pladsen er placeret uden for byen - så der er en gåtur på cirka 2 km. Ind til restauranter og butikker.
Der er roligt på pladsen (som dog ikke var fyldt pga. årstiden).
Toilet og badefaciliteter var rigtig fine - og rengjorte.
Vi benyttede det udendørs fælleskøkken område - det var ligeledes pænt og rent.

Super friendly woman at the reception!

The toilet/ shower facilities are okay.
Our site had a huge mud whole. At other campsites we also parked in the grass but for some reason it was better there and there wasn‘t that much mud even though it rained too. Maybe they hardened the floor somehow. I think that would be a great improvement for Tasman too as they are usually the more expensive campsites.

The birdfeeding at 4pm was lovely! Make sure to be there at 4 and don‘t miss it

Located about 2km from the inner city. Very calm and not to much noise from the road.
Busstop just outside soo getting in to town is very easy.
Good amenities such as showers and restrooms. The outside kitchens were clean.
Great campsite

We absolutely loved our stay at Tasman Holiday Parks in Airlie Beach and would recommend it to anyone looking for a relaxing and convenient place to stay.

We booked one of the glamping tents and were genuinely impressed. The space is huge, the kitchen has everything you could possibly need, and they even provide shampoo, conditioner, and body wash, such a convenient touch.

We were also pleasantly surprised by how spotless everything was. A big thank you to the housekeeping team for their amazing work!

The location is incredibly practical too. There’s a bus stop right in front of the park, and it’s only a quick 5 minute ride into Airlie Beach.

If you book activities through GetYourGuide (we did a helicopter tour and a boat day), they pick you up directly from the park, which made everything super easy!

A special shout out to the staff, everyone was lovely, but the lady at reception really stood out (I unfortunately didn’t get her name). She was so warm, smiley, and genuinely happy to be there that we felt at home the moment we arrived.

If we had to mention one tiny thing, it’s that we wished the pool was a bit cooler, but honestly, it didn’t affect our stay at all.

Overall, a fantastic experience. We’d happily come back!

Please DO NOT stay at this holiday park! We stayed in February 2026 and unfortunately had a terrible experience.

We booked with booking.com and the photos displaying the rooms we booked were completely misleading and different from the rooms we got when we arrived. From the moment we entered we noticed that nothing was cleaned, there was dirt and grime on the tables and counters, absolutely no maintenance or upkeep had been done (broken cupboards, chipped paint, smudges of dirt and scrapes on the walls) and even mould was present throughout the place.

After initially bringing our complaint to booking.com, they contacted the manager of Tasman Holiday parks who then agreed to move us to a glamping tent. At first we thought this was an upgrade but before we could even move our suitcases into the new place we noticed it was also not cleaned and the toilet wasn’t even FLUSHED and had pee in it (see photo attached). We asked for cleaning products and gloves to clean the place ourselves. We needed to buy, out of pocket, various insecticides and bug sprays as we spent the first night trying to overcome a fly invasion. We had to kill over 100 flies over the first two days in the glamping tent, since we were placed directly in front of the garbage dump! We also found a cockroach in the dishwasher… some upgrade :( We were horrified, unable to sleep and unsure if even our bed sheets had been washed.

We took several photos of both places we stayed at for proof of how awful our stay was. This was not just disappointing but it was unacceptable. There was a complete lack of hygiene and disregard of professionalism from the cleaning and management staff that work at Tasman Holiday parks. The woman at the front desk was super kind and tried her best to handle the situation but it clearly needs to be addressed by the management team. We expect at minimum a full refund for our stay and will be in contact with booking.com to ensure that we receive the compensation we deserve. Save yourselves the trouble and please book elsewhere!
Nice and clean powered spots, and a very reasonable price as well! There is a great coffee shop at the reception, open every morning.
Would highly recommend. A very lovely holiday park just outside Airlie Beach. Loved our stay there.
Excellent park located right across from pub found the staff friendly and helpful

Camping très bien placé (à 5 min en voiture du centre)
Camping propre, food truck présent tous les soirs, concert dans la semaine et possible de nourriture des oiseaux tous les jours !
Personnel très accueillant !
Je recommande fortement

Sehr nette deutschsprachige
Empfangsdame. Toiletten sehr sauber.Sehr günstiger Preis, mein Zeltplatz.Rundum Zufrieden.

My family and I stayed in a 2 bedroom cabin for a week. Despite being there during a cyclone, the managers were up the next day cleaning everything, making sure the facilities were clean and ready for guests to use asap. The staff were super helpful and the cabin was clean with everything you could need (iron, hair dryer, kitchen utensils etc.) A 50 cent bus, $10 taxi ride or 20 minute walk into the heart of town. Would definitely stay again!

Spacious sites, clean and tidy amenities. Location good for us as we don’t like being in the hustle bustle! Only thing the grass was long and a lot of dead undergrowth on trees and plants it would have been 5 stars if that was in check.

Stayed for a family event in January and had a wonderful time. Staff were friendly and helpful, the facilities are all you could ask for,  with a great outdoor BBQ area. Our highlight was the afternoon Bird Feeding, where you can hand feed the rainbow lorikeets.
Highly recommend this holiday park, clean amenities and cabins! Friendly staff and plenty to do! Will be back for sure:)
Awesome location. Cabins were very well looked after and the park was in great condition.

Cant recommend enough!
We had an ensuite site and the bathroom was nicer than the one we have at home haha.
The park has beautifully maintained gardens, the facilities were top notch, the people were always lovely and friendly.
The team will text you about any food trucks they have setting up shop that night, and they have a coffee truck out the front each day. An ice cream truck also comes through in the afternoons for the sweet tooths out there.
Will be back if we are up that way again.
The camping area is nice, with many clean amenities. There’s a daily parrot feeding, which is really fun. The sites are spacious, and there are many different bird species around the campsite.
Love this place
Nice holiday park with everything you need.

Good location - approx a 20 min walk into town. There is a bus stop just around the corner and for 50c it will take you into town - they run every 30-40 mins approx.

Reception was friendly and helpful. There is a small selection of drinks and consumables for purchase.

There is a pub called the Jubilee Tavern right across the road and there was a Thai food truck here for two of the nights (gets mixed reviews - we didn’t try).  There is a coffee truck at the entrance for morning coffee which is a nice convenience.

We booked the ‘brand new’ one bdrm cabin. Launched in 2023 - it is 2 years old and although cute, it was surface clean only and not brand new. First thing we are greeted with - an extremely worn door mat and the sliding door was filthy. And a very distinctive odour - the drains? The shower needs a good scrub and it’s really not hard to remove all the black scuff marks on the white paneled walls.  It is clear there has been a big investment in these cabins and they aren’t being maintained to a high standard. The couch was covered in stains as was the little rug under the dining table.

You can sit outside on the little deck and look at the rubbish that hasn’t been removed but the smell is pretty potent.   We couldn’t park the car on the concrete provided due to the overgrown plants.

The bed was very comfortable although the wooden base is very rickety. No aircon in the bedroom - just a ceiling fan. We slept fairly well even though we are right next to the main road.  The kitchen had  everything we needed, managed to fit everything into the mini fridge.

The pool is a nice temperature, looked clean - however the tiles above the water line are in dire need of a good scrub.

We had a walk around the park and it has great potential. But it’s neglected and the bare minimum is what is being executed, from the grounds to the facilities.  Whoever is in charge here is at fault.  Attention to detail is lacking, from the trolleys containing used laundry right at reception to the container of palm fronds in the visitors car.  This is back of house stuff we don’t need to see.

We did enjoy our stay in general. At almost $300 a night for a cabin in low season, it correlates to the quality and value for money you expect. I would expect to pay $180 a night tops for this experience.

Do I recommend?  If you aren’t bothered by the details or cleanliness, this is an ok place to stay.  When we return to Airlie will we rebook?  We will look at other options.
It is ok

We overall enjoyed our stay at this campsite, even though we were only there for one night. Check-in was very smooth and easy, which we really appreciated. The amenities were great — there’s a shared kitchen with a fridge and freezer, plenty of cooking spots, BBQ areas, and lots of tables for eating. You can even watch TV in the kitchen, which was a nice bonus. The toilets and showers were well maintained and clean. The only downside is that the campsite is right beside the road, so it can get a bit noisy at night. I’d definitely recommend bringing earplugs if you’re after a more peaceful sleep.

Extremely disappointing stay - ant infestation and cockroaches.

We stayed at Tasman Holiday Park in Airlie Beach and, unfortunately, our experience was pretty bad. Our original cabin had a significant ant infestation in the kitchen - at least 50 ants roaming around the counters and cupboards. We completely understand it’s a tropical climate, but this was far beyond what you’d reasonably expect.

On top of that, we found two live large cockroaches - one in the dishwasher and another in the cupboard under the sink. This made it really difficult to feel comfortable, and we barely slept that first night. As it was late, we didn’t have much choice but to stay in the infested cabin.

We emailed the park and they did move us to a new cabin the next day, which we appreciated, but we weren’t offered any compensation or partial refund for the night we spent in the original cabin with the infestation, despite requesting this.

Based off on our experience regarding the level of cleanliness and the lack of acknowledgment for the inconvenience, we wouldn’t recommend it and wouldn’t stay there again.

We stayed at Tasman Holiday Park in Airlie Beach and, unfortunately, our experience was pretty bad. Our original cabin had a significant ant infestation in the kitchen - at least 50 ants roaming around the counters and cupboards. We completely understand it’s a tropical climate, but this was far beyond what you’d reasonably expect.||On top of that, we found two live large cockroaches - one in the dishwasher and another in the cupboard under the sink. This made it really difficult to feel comfortable, and we barely slept that first night. As it was late, we didn’t have much choice but to stay in the infested cabin.||We emailed the park and they did move us to a new cabin the next day, which we appreciated, but we weren’t offered any compensation or partial refund for the night we spent in the original cabin with the infestation, despite requesting this. ||Based off on our experience regarding the level of cleanliness and the lack of acknowledgment for the inconvenience, we wouldn’t recommend it and wouldn’t stay there again.

Ein sehr schöner Campingplatz, mit dem Bus ist Arlie Beach und auch alles andere sehr einfach zu erreichen. Wir haben 2 mal hier Stopp gemacht einmal auf dem Weg in den Norden Richtung Cairns und einmal auf dem Rückweg. Beide Male haben wir einen Unpowerd Site gehabt welche für 2-3 Tage völlig Ausreichend sind. Bei unserem 2. Besuch ist uns der Schatten der Mango Bäume auf den Unpowerd Sites zum Verhängnis geworden. Eine Mango hat Abends unsere Windschutzscheibe getroffen und ziemlich stark beschädigt. Am nächsten Morgen war die Dame an der Rezeption sehr hilfsbereit und uns wurde direkt ein neuer Platz gegeben ohne das wir dies angesprochen haben. Auch wurde direkt unsere Scheibe begutachtet und eine Werkstatt gesucht. Leider ergab sich aufgrund von Lieferproblemen eine Wartezeit für die neue Scheibe. Für uns allerdings kein Problem da wir Zeit hatten. Die Kosten für die Scheibe und Reparatur wurden übernommen auch durften wir die Tage, die wir auf die neue Windschutzscheibe gewartet haben kostenlos auf dem Platz stehen.

Wir würden jederzeit wiederkommen!!
Surprisingly quiet in the couples section cabin despite how popular the park is. Well maintained and relaxing stay.

We had a wonderful stay at Tasman Holiday Parks in Airlie Beach! The park is beautifully maintained, peaceful, and perfectly located for exploring the Whitsundays. The facilities were clean, modern, and well looked after, and the whole place has a really relaxed holiday vibe.

The staff were friendly and helpful from the moment we arrived, which made the stay even more enjoyable. We also loved the pool area and the leafy surroundings — such a nice place to unwind after a day of activities.

Overall, a fantastic holiday park that exceeded our expectations. We’d happily stay here again and highly recommend it to anyone visiting Airlie Beach!

Stayed here for 2 nights and check in was quick and easy and the ladies were so nice and helpful.

Great location to town and a 5 min bus ride ($.50) The ladies at the desk gave us a bus schedule that really helped.

We stayed in site 61 and our first ensuite of our 5 week trip. (We go home in 4 days)  Thought would give it a try and great feature.  The water pressure was great and it was pretty clean. Our toilet seat was in the weirdest place and the rim stuck out about 1.5 inches past the seat. (Gross) We let them know and hey came ride away and fixed it. TY 🙏

I think there is also an ant mound or termite mounds starting on the wall above the door.

The grounds were very unkept from what we were used to in Big4's.  Leaves and dirt all over the place. The pools was cloudy and the grounds unkept.

They had 3 BBQs but one was out of service by the pool. We couldn't get on as there was a wait of 5 people deep to use it.

We loved the location but might try somewhere else if we came back.

Pretty good location for Airlie Beach, with the 861, 860 bus to the centre just a five minute walk away. The site is quite peaceful. Two food trucks call by in the evening and there is a tavern 3 mins aways on foot. Clean facilities plus really cute Bush Stone Curlew birds across the site to emtertain you.
Was ok, although not my scene,  l have vertigo so the hills and the whole unevenness done my head in, short walk over to the tavern over the back, nice park great amenities

Thanks Craig tempory manager for making me feel at home also thanks Pam for meeting our needs l cannot express how awesome out suite and stay here was yes close to everything easy parking totally reccomend this resort .... from Mary room 10 😊

We had a great 3 night stay on an unpowered site for the Airlie Music Festival.  Very close to the fabulous camp kitchen.. a lovely area with everything you need.  A short walk to modern clean amenities.  A pleasant 25 minute walk into town.  Congrats to the team on a lovely park.
Frauen Toiletten und Duschen waren leider nicht so sauber

The Tasman Holiday Park in Airlie Beach was one of the best campgrounds we visited during our 3-week trip through Australia. The site is immaculately maintained, with super clean communal kitchens and sanitary facilities. We treated ourselves to a powered site with a private bathroom, which felt like pure luxury after more than a week on the road.

We also did our laundry there – the washing machines and dryers were spotless and in excellent condition, and you can even buy small packets of laundry detergent on-site if you don’t have your own.

The staff were incredibly friendly, and we can wholeheartedly recommend the Tasman Holiday Park to everyone!

By the way, the Tasman Holiday Park in Cairns, which we booked afterwards, was just as clean and well-kept – definitely among the best parks of our entire trip!
Beautiful place to stay.

Great Caravan park. Really good pool, jumping pillow and playground for the kids. Located really close to Town, and opposite a large restaurant/pub (with playground for kids). Site was a good size and facilities clean, the daily bird feeding was great.
Sara at the front desk was so pleasant and helpful. The ensuit sites are wonderful. Good size sites.
Great location and excellent facilities

Stayed in the glamping tents - Amazing experience. Reasonably new, comfy beds, great sized bathroom and spaces. Kids loved it
Got a little hot on sides during the day but didnt worry us as we had the fans and air con going, as well as werent spending time there during the day.
Daily feeding of the birds at 4pm was amazing. Pool and playground was great for kids (2 and 5yo)

The campground itself isn’t bad… pretty much your average Tasman, but it’s been built right next to a stagnant creek, which means mosquitoes and midges are everywhere, especially at night.
The place has potential, but maintenance and cleanliness are a real issue. The bathrooms were in terrible condition, the camp kitchen was dirty and disorganized, and during the four days we stayed, the bins were never emptied. There was rubbish and bad smell all around our camping area.
A shame, because the location could be great, but it really needs better cleaning

Nice campsite, shame people are a bit dirty (kitchen/toilet), other than that the campsite is pretty cool. Enjoyed our stay, receptionist were lovely.
Early morning you can find outside reception a butcher truck and also a Thai food truck in the evenings, which was quite cool.
The area is great.

Staff were welcoming and friendly, the location was a short 4-min drive to the main part of Airlie. The swimming pool and kids’ playground were great to keep the kids entertained. We could only book the studio room as that’s all that was left, but it suited us for what we needed, but the bathroom is very small. There is a tavern across the road which has a great atmosphere and a daily coffee van and food van at our accommodation. Overall, a great place to stay during the school holidays and good value for money.

We hebben hier op de camping gestaan met onze camper. Dus over de kamers kan ik niets vertellen. De toiletten en douches waren niet schoon wanneer je ook kwam. Personeel niet vriendelijk. Verder prima camping om op te staan. Niet te groot. Er zijn heel veel vogels wat het heel leuk maakt. Je ziet hoe dichterbij Shute Harbour voor als je iets boekt om naar de Outer reeds te gaan. Pak de bus kost $0,50 per rit. Airly Beach is ook heel dichtbij met restaurants en winkels. Dat is echt een badplaats voor yuppen. Veel mensen uit Sydney vliegen hier naar toe.

By far the best caravan park we stayed  at in our 2 month camping adventure/journey from Victoria up to the Daintree and back down again .Big spacious sites in among beautiful tropical gardens,friendly helpful staff ,fantastic internet,drinking water ,pool,undercover barbie  social area ,awesome playground etc the list goes on .
Definitely recommend 🌴☀️🐠

Das war die schlechteste Campingplatzerfahrung ever.
Wir haben eine Powered Site gebucht. Diese war klar auf der Homepage beschrieben. Diese sollte leveled surfaces beeinhalten. Wir bekamen einen Platz ohne diesen. Was eigentlich auch nicht tragisch wäre. Allerdings befand sich dieser gegenüber der Laundries, eben laut und nervig. Diese Art von Plätzen, also in unmittelbarer Nähe von Facilities sollen laut Homepage billigeren Small Offgrid Sites sein. Im Übrigen ist unser Platz auch kleiner als die regulären Powered Sites.
Man behauptete seitens der Rezeption wir hätten eine solche powered site erhalten. Wo war nur der leveled surface? Also kann das ja nicht stimmen. Lächerlich.

Um einen anderen Platz zu erhalten, hätten wir während der Öffnungszeiten anwesend sein müssen. Schwierig bei limitierten Öffnungszeiten und gebuchten Ausflug. Es kann ja wohl nicht so schwierig sein, eine Platznummer der gebuchten Kategorie per Mail zu versenden.

Scheinbar scheint an der Rezeption nur inkompetentes Personal zu sitzen, die ihre eigenen Sites nicht den Parzellen zuordnen können.
Schade sowas.

Nice campground outside of Airlie Beach. Busstop just outside the park to get you to center of town. Or walk for about 20 min. Amenities good and clean. Not much room and privacy on the campsite and not very peacefull.
Had a few days spare before meeting friends so booked in here. Great park with really good amenities. Across from Tavern. Bys stop not far taking about 3mins into Airlie.
the accomodation was nice for 3 people, the toilets were clean and so was the laundry. unfortunately there were a lot of ants in the room.

We stayed at this park last year and it was awesome but this year it wasn’t, in fact we will not stay there again. Price was very high at $87 for a powered site although we did get our 10% member discount. Showers have not been maintained and water was only like warm at 7am when most people were still sleeping so it wasn’t due to many people using them. Soap holders have broken and not been replaced. Shower heads are corroded and need replacing. Many dog owners appear to believe that the dog on leash policy doesn’t apply to them and management are not monitoring this issue. Some sites are quite small which is causing people to partially park on the site next to them which is also an issue that you are expected to sort out for yourself. I do not recommend this tourist park. High fees for low quality.
Water pressure was not good and we were bitten by Miggies. Also had to wait for an hour before we could check in and then we had to prune a bush so we could get into the site.Not worth the money.
We camped in our camper, great spot close to everything lovely amenities always a plus, would definitely recommend 👌

We had an issue with our booked room, which we reported at the reception. The very friendly lady at the front desk helped us immediately and with great kindness – something we have rarely experienced before! Big compliments to her! After that, we had a wonderful stay. We also really appreciated the coffee cart at the parking entrance.
Très bien situé

Super Campingplatz mit jede Menge Möglichkeiten.
Egal ob klassisch Campen oder Glamping. Alles dabei.
Waschmöglichkeiten mit Karte zahlbar.
Perfekt!

Great location and easy check-in process. Toilets and facilities all clean and working. We  booked a cabin with shared bathroom which was great for what we needed, however the room looked a bit tired and doesn't look as nice as the photos (which I suspect are from a few years ago when the park maybe first opened). Overall good value for money. Thanks
Rude staff, no one ever gets back to you. Don’t waste your time

Nous avons payé 108$ pour une place avec l'électricité en van pour 4 ( 2 adultes et 2 enfants).  Une des 2 laveries était hors service, une des 2 cuisines était sans électricité ( donc pas de grill pain, bouilloire fonctionnels) et 1 des 2 blocs sanitaires fermé pour nettoyage pendant 2 heures (de 8h à 10h)! Vu le nombre de vacanciers dans le camping, c'était donc l'embouteillage dans ces différents endroits. Pour le prix payé, ce n'est pas acceptable.

Très bref passage ici pour nous car les inondations nous ont empêchés d'arriver à l'heure prévue et d'y dormir. Le bungalow était facile à trouver, propre, nous avons pris une douche aux sanitaires communs, eux aussi propre et récent, petit plus pour le stand à l'entrée qui nous a permis de repartir avec quelque chose dans le ventre !

We zijn 5 nachten verbleven op deze camping in het unpowered gedeelte. Perfecte camping met een zeer moderne en goed uitgeruste keuken. Alle faciliteiten zijn zeer schoon en goed onderhouden en er staan heel veel wasmachines, verspreid over de 2 toiletgebouwen.

Naast de camping ligt een bushalte waardoor je heel gemakkelijk met de bus naar het centrum kunt, maar ook lopend is dit prima te doen.

De medewerkers zijn ook heel vriendelijk en nemen de tijd om vragen te beantwoorden. We komen hier heel graag nog eens terug.

Checkin is easy, staff in the reception is very lovely. I like they have little truck at the front entrance for Thai food at night, coffee and breakfast in the morning. We booked the powered site, they are quite busy there. There only 2 bbq cooking spot and a sink, so use your own stuff to cook and luckily we don’t need to wait for cleaning dishes. I guess because there are two spots for cook and clean, so each spot is not too big. Nice and just enough for everything you need.

Pretty disappointed and left with a bit of a disgusting feeling. Leaving a negative review as I believe this was a campsite issue rather than an issue with another guest. Our site was soaked due to the neighbours grey water running on to our mats and swags. Seems like the sites we were on around the edges of the site should not allow anyone to drain their waste as the sites are all on a slope without any proper drains. Unfortunately we had a family of 6ish next door, with a washing machine and a shower, so there was constantly grey water pouring out and into our site. Pretty gross knowing that there would be urine diluted with dirty laundry water all over our belongings. I did contact Tasman support online and also submitted a form to Tasman Airlie Beach but did not receive a reply.
Great park
Fantastic park. Great facilities with warm friendly staff all set in a very well maintained location. Highly recommended.

I recommend this place only for its proximity to town. Its an easy walk in. Also very close to the marina for day trips to the islands. That is my only plus.
We booked 4 months before arrival. Yes 4 months. Only to find out we were paying almost double to our neighbouring sites. When I went to politely enquire about pricing, I was told an AI system priced the sites due to demand."Dynamic pricing its called"
While on her computer the front desk lady said through her teeth to her manager, " this is what I have to deal with" I said excuse me? Oh not you darling, this computer system. ( i think not)
So I was told she'd get back to me after discussing with the manager. That did not happen.
I also had a complaint about the bird feeding station being too close to the washing lines. I had to re wash 6 items as the birds had dropped poop on them. Disgusting! Plus the shear number of birds, Rainbow lorikeets and Sulphur crested cockatoos are in such proportion that its stomach turning, like a plague. This coming from a bird fancier.
Now to our site. We were at the back of the park by the rear fence. The site was wet and puddley. So we couldn't reverse all the way in as we'd be stepping in mud and water. Then there was nowhere to park our vehicle. So had to have an area allocated for parking.
I did go back to ask about our site price and was offered 10% discount to shut me up. When infact it should of been more like 40% to bring inline with similar neighbouring sites.
So being quietly polite doesn't work, so they can have this truthful review instead.
I did not use the facilities as we are completely self contained. But I would say they wouldn't be pristine. Most of the staff are backpackers who don't really have their heart in it. So care factor, nil.

We arrived late on a Friday during the busy school holidays, and just about everything in Airlie Beach was fully booked. We thought we were out of luck — until we met the amazing team at the caravan park reception, Rachel and Sarah. These two absolute legends went above and beyond to help my partner and me, and somehow made a miracle happen for us.

One of the most important things in hospitality is that warm first impression, and Rachel and Sarah nailed it. They were cheerful, welcoming, and clearly love what they do. It made all the difference.

The motorhome park itself was fantastic — clean, well-maintained, and in a prime location. There’s even a great pub just across the road, which was a nice bonus after a long day on the road.

Honestly, we feel like we got the better end of the deal. If it weren’t for those two reception angels, we would’ve been stuck. Huge thanks to the team at this Airlie Beach caravan park — you turned our night around and made our stay unforgettable.

Highly recommend it! 👍
We asked to book another night and they were super helpful in finding us another room...the kids loved the playground and bouncy pillow. Lots of kids all playing together. Not far from main town.

La recepción muy buena, muy atentas.
La ubicación muy buena.
Nos pareció caro el precio en relación a la limpieza de la habitación. Si bien la cama muy cómoda, le faltan detalles a la limpieza como al aire acondicionado.

Our motel room is just enough size for our family. We stayed 5 days and it has pretty much what we needed for our stay. The toilet and shower in our room though is a bit tight so if you are on a bigger size this could be an issue. Our kids loved the playground and enjoyed 4pm bird feeding daily. These areas had midgies. My legs are covered in red spots after returning home few days later but the rest of my family didn’t have any. The staff here are very accomodating. They send text msg almost daily for informations such as food van schedule. There is one regular morning food van in the park with lovely coffee, acai bowl and toasties. Overall, we enjoyed our stay.

No blankets provided for four of the bunk beds. a sheet (which the quilt should be in) was placed on each bed but nothing inside. three blankets, which are not think enough to sleep in and would be best used for sitting outside, were used instead and the night was very cold, to the point where we struggled to sleep. luckily only three people were using the four bunk beds, but if we had a fourth (which the room was set up for) someone would have had to sleep completely bare. additionally the one aircon’s (in the living room) heating function did not work. do not recommend especially in winter and after reception is closed
Don't be fooled by the photos. Very basic and crowded.

Great place to stay has everything you need lots of accommodation to choose from. And the office ladys are very friendly and helpful.  Has a different food trailer every night if you don't feel like cooking. And has a coffee cart on the mornings and is walking distance to the town ship from the park

Great place to stay, with family and friends.
The park has great amenities, clean, neat & tidy, Its  Run  well by friendly   management and staff.  Terrific Food van onsite with fish chips ,pizza,etc
Recently updated areas and playground .
New Accommodations. Shopping Centre  with several other shops located 300mtrs up the road . Tavern across the road with a playground , Restaurant, Sports Bar .
Bus Stop at front gate. Or a 5 min walk to Airlie main St.
Quiet .👍.

We booked a large site to fit our caravan, the site was not as expected.  Our car could not fit either, they gave us the lot next door to park the car. The showers were terrible.  Warm water only, even when we complained they used the excuse that the amount of clients using the shower drained the hot water. All 4 days we were there, the water was just warm!! Half the showers had no shelves to accommodate soaps etc. The shower nozzles needed replacing from calcium build up causing water to spray every which way rather than onto your body.
I wouldn't recommend staying here, better options out there in Airlie Bch.
Great location, very convenient. Friendly staff, good clean amenities

Glampibg Tents are the best !
The Girls at the front desk are very accomodating,

Great place to park the van for a few days, van site en suite was great
Great pub across the road 'Jubilee Tavern'

Schöner Campingplatz in Airlie Beach. Er liegt ca. 2km von der Lagoone (Stadtzentrum) entfernt. Mit dem Bus ist man in 10min dort für nur 50cent. Der Campingplatz war touristischer als die anderen auf denen wir waren, ist aber sehr gut ausgestattet. Die WC‘s und Duschen waren sehr sauber und modern. Tägl. Steht vor dem Campingplatz bei der Einfahrt ein kleiner Café Wagen, wo man Café (Cappuccino ca. 6$) und Brownies (sogar glutenfrei)/ Coockies bekommt. Die Mitarbeiter*innen der Rezeption waren sehr freundlich. Es gibt einen Kinderspielplatz mit Klettergerüst, Rutsche und eine Art „Hüpfburg“.
Wir können den Campingplatz nur weiterempfehlen und haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt!
We had an ensuite park for our motorhome. Highly recommend
On the day I went that was too slippery and wet. Many people fell on the mud. But it was a very good adventure like amazon gotest. And finally I saw three iguanas.
Beautiful park for a good price. Location is alright

Schön Campingplatz an den Whitsundays.
Man kommt dem Bus super einfach in die Stadt und es gibt einen Frühstücks Food Truck direkt am Campingplatz (Guter Cappuccino!).
Es gibt jeden Abend abwechselnd einen Food Truck, wobei ich den mit “Koreanischem Essen” nicht empfehle.

Really great facilities for kids, they had so much fun on all the play equipment and it kept them entertained. We got the cabin which was really nice. However, my mum got the glamping tent and if I returned I would definitely choose this option, it was lovely and really big, the photos didn’t do it justice. Highly recommended this site! The staff are ao friendly and helpful, they helped us out with a very generous late checkout on the morning we had to leave. My step son left his iPad and the staff were really helpful with assisting us locate and returning.

Probably the best park we stayed at (out of the 10+ parks) on our trip in Queensland. The wining card for us was the camp kitchen, and bathrooms, and of course the coffee cart in the morning with a delicious coffee.
We loooooved our stay. We Will come back to this place. This is home away from real home
Perfekte Lage, saubere Anlagen und super freundliches Personal! Die Stellplätze sind großzügig und die Atmosphäre entspannt. Ideal als Ausgangspunkt für die Whitsundays. Absolut empfehlenswert!

The park is amazing and when our flights got moved and cancelled the ladies at the counter were nice to us and helped us get a room for way cheaped than we probably should have.
I didnt think much arriving but im leaving with a smile on my face.
IMO get a glamping tent. The experience would be amazing. Will be coming back 100%
Booking was very simple and easy. Great communication from staff. Big shout out to Freya! She is so lovely. Keen for our stay

We had a great stay at Tasman Holiday Park. The motel room we booked was spacious and clean, which made for a comfortable stay. The pool was one of the best we've seen at a holiday park – it was really well-maintained.

We also appreciated the coffee and food truck by the entrance, making it easy to grab a bite or coffee without needing to head into town.

We’d definitely stay here again.

This place is LOVELY

So well kept, beautiful landscaping, nice and quiet, good play equipment for kids, lovely amenities.

Stayed here in a cabin also, the cabin was really reasonably priced. It is slightly dated, but very clean, aircon, full size fridge, undercover car park space next to the cabin too which was great.

Check in was easy and the lady at the desk was very welcoming, informative and polite. They seem to have some good food trucks frequenting the place too, I saw a cafe style one in the day and a wood fire pizza one in the evening.

Had a really good stay and will be back in the future!

30 min Fußweg von Airlie Beach. Oder 5 Minuten mit dem Bus.
Wir hatten ein Zimmer was gut war.
Emplacement avec salle de bain privée pour 4 nuits moins de 40$ bien placé, bruyant par les oiseaux mais c'est la nature sinon très content de notre séjour

Brilliant place, on the outskirts of the busy little beach hot spot, perfect for a bit quieter couple of days.|Checked in at reception, super friendly and quick, straight on our pitch and set up within 20 mins. We had a slab pitch with electric. Good space for a small to medium size camper. |Toilet/showers good and clean. Didn’t use the laundry. Pool was a nice refreshing change after a long day in the heat and there are loungers in the shade too.|Food trucks and coffee trucks for people with limited facilities, saw the pizzas coming out and they looked amazing.
Fantastic spot

We had an absolutely amazing stay there! Everything was fantastic—the bird feeding, the friendly staff, our accommodation, and the park itself. I would go back in a heartbeat.

Important: The sleeping tree for all the cockatoos in the area is there, so it gets a bit louder in the evening. We loved this natural spectacle!

Mon expérience globale est très moyenne.
Le micro onde du coin cuisine ne fonctionne pas correctement, les laveuses et sèches linges sont en pannes... Bref si seulement c'était affiché des le départ on serait allé ailleurs.

Out of the 8 washing machines, ALL were out of order. I can understand one breaks, maybe 2... but 8?? I guess the owners are just too lazy to fix them. The least they could do is warn the clients on their website.
No laundry washing facilities at all in the whole park. Very poor. Apparently has been like this for a while. You should do better.

Great park on the outskirts of Airlie. Park has great cooking facilities and laundry on site along with a pool which we got good use of. We had en-suite site so amenities here were great. Plenty of space and clean. Staff super friendly. And park had specials on for food over the duration of our stay with people visiting with wood fire pizzas to mini pancakes

Wir standen hier mit unserem Van für 3 Nächte, um die Whitsundays zu erkunden.
Sehr schöner ruhiger Platz mit modernen und sauberen sanitären Anlagen.
WLAN funktionierte einwandfrei. Schöner Pool den wir gerne zur Abkühlung genutzt haben.
Leider funktionierte keine der diversen Waschmaschinen auf dem Platz, welche wir sonst gerne genutzt hätten. Für uns sah es so aus, als würden diese bereits länger nicht funktionieren. Hier wäre eine zeitnahe Reparatur angebracht.
Ins Zentrum von Airlie beach muss man fahren, zu Fuß ist es zu weit.

Great park close to town. Very clean and lovely grounds. Staff super helpful. Lots of lovely cabins and sites. A variety of food trucks in including Thai, Pizza and Korean. Kids love the jumping pillow and beautiful clean pool. Great camp kitchens. Definitely be returning. Thank you Tasman
Rigtig lækker campingplads med en god stemning. Rigtig gode køkken- og badefaciliteter. Mange unge mennesker, men kun god stemning, ingen larm.
Cozy and beautiful place, with clean amenities and walking distance to Airlie central. Been there before and will be back.

We are just on the way home from a truly great week at Tasman Park in Airlie Beach. The service from the office staff was just amazing, so helpful and accommodating and friendly, the park itself was gorgeous and lush and tropical, perfectly maintained and the amenities were always clean. The location was great and it was a short easy drive or even a walk into the centre of town. We had the best stay and were so happy our dog could enjoy this wonderful park with us. Couldn’t recommend it highly enough, we will be back

本次“小白环澳自驾游”有幸入住艾尔利海滩的塔斯曼假日公园，这是我迄今为止去过的最好的露营地之一。地理位置优越，营地环境优美，房间整洁，性价比高，管理一流，人员素质高。这里要特别表达一下感谢之情，感谢塔斯曼的工作人员和管理人员，主动与我联系，将我遗留在54号房间里的物品（IPad 、翡翠吊坠、近视眼镜、手电等），全部寄给了2千余公里的墨尔本，这些东西对我来说是至关重要的，失而复得，感激之情无以言表，再一次为他（她）们的高尚品德点赞👍👍👍。

This "Little White Road Trip around Australia" had the pleasure of staying at Tasman Holiday Park in Airlie Beach, one of the best campsites I've ever been to. Superior geographical location, beautiful camp environment, clean rooms, cost-effective, first-class management, high quality personnel. Here I would like to express my gratitude to the Tasman staff and management staff, who took the initiative to contact me and sent the items I left in Room 54 (IPad, emerald pendant, myopia glasses, flashlight, etc.) to Melbourne, more than 2,000 kilometers, these things are vital to me, lost and recovered, grateful beyond words. Once again, I applaud them for their great character 👍👍👍.

Untidy amenities, washing machines all out of order and smells like a garbage dump due to the unsightly way they are collecting garbage. Used to be immaculate. Same fall in standards as Rollingstone Park. We have stayed at both locations on numerous occasions.

We parked a camper in a powered "premium" spot at the Tasman Holiday Park in Airlie Beach which included a private bathroom and a hotplate.

Although the park itself is in great condition we were very disappointed that ALL 8 washing machines were out of order!!! (And have been for about a month we were told). They looked ancient and I am sure they didn't all die at once, so I think this is very poor management. We had to schlep down the road in the rain to the laundrette and walk back in the dark, as it was a big reason why we booked this park.

The location is in Jubilee heads, about a 30-40min walk in to town, not recommendable in the dark, not ideal - try to take the bus instead.

Our bathroom was great, but our "private hotplate" was full of brown cooking grease from the last guests. Not appealing. We ended up using the shared hotplate in the communal cooking area (which was very good).

So, Tasman - pull your socks up!
Very convenient location, affordable price and great amenities, clean kitchen, clean bathrooms, and friendly staff
Bravo! Great staff, location and hotel!
We stayed in a 6 bed dorm and it was very clean and perfect!

Tasman Holiday Park in Airlie Beach is the best campsite I have been to by far. We had an en-suite site, it was lovely, as nice as my bathroom at home. The park is spotlessly clean. The staff are really helpful with lots of information on trips and restraunts in the Whitsundays. The pool area is amazing. Great value for money, I can't wait to go back.

Really great tourist park - has every possible facility we could want while camping around Australia, and is always clean.

The bird feeding and food trucks outside are nice touches too

My husband and I only stayed one night here but we enjoyed our stay. The park is very well laid out. We had a studio cabin and there was everything there to make our stay comfortable but next time we would probably book a bigger cabin.  The unit was clean and tidy and the price is very reasonable. We wanted to stay another night on our return journey but the park was booked out.  Very nice holiday park and I would recommend to anyone.
We had the best experience for camping in our camped van here, amazing staff, amenities, location and all around just a really lovely place.
In 15 Minuten am Strand. Alles sehr entspannt und sauber. Vogelfütterung klasse. Die Dame am Empfang super sympathisch und freundlich. Gerne wieder, empfehlenswert.

Powered ensuite site which was brand new and also came with BBQ! Every ensuite site has own BBQ which was lovely a very welcome surprise. The ensuites are beautifully clean, spacious and well maintained. There is a great little tavern across the road which offers a simple but quite extensive well priced menu. Dining is casual and efficient. A great little park for a stopover.
Had a great time with the family. The kids easily entertained themselves.
SHAME on this park Mashed window on our van  from a plam frond ,the management didn't want to know about it . Very disappointing

Sehr schöne Unterkunftznd gepflegtes Gelände.
Die Hütten sind sauber und mit Mikrowelle ausgestattet. Für einen Herd muss man die Outdoor küchen benutzen.

Der Pool war super und bietet mit 2 flachen Becken den perfekten Bereich für uns mit Baby. Und warm.

Hütte 36 am Pool hat ein Riesen Moskito Problem !!!!! Egal zu welcher Uhrzeit waren hier immer 20-30 Moskitos an der Scheibe.
Das rein und raus gehen in die Hütte war jedes Mal eine Qual da man sich so beeilen muss. An draußen sitzen war gar nicht erst zu denken.

Lovely tropical gardens, bird feeding at 4pm.
Amenities are immaculate. Big double slab.
Staff are very friendly and helpful.
Highly recommend.

Great campsite. The amenities were large and very clean with music on all day, even at nights. It was spacious and the park is very well maintained. The gardener does a great job. The campkitchen is a nice place with a large television with the possibility for Netflix and just channels. Large fridges and the WiFi is very good! Bird feeding every day at 4pm, but there are a lot of birds during the day as well. Service also very good. In the mornings there is a coffeevan from 7-10am en on some nights there is a foodtruck in the evening. You get a notification through a text of the food available that night. Highly recommend!
All was great!

Wir waren super zufrieden mit diesem Campingplatz. Die Campingplätze waren groß genug, die Sanitäranlagen sauber und ausreichend, die Waschmaschinen & Trockner waren der Wahnsinn (lediglich waren etliche defekt), die Menschen vom Service und auf dem Campingplatz selbst waren sehr freundlich. Wir kommen gern wieder, danke.

Beautiful park, had an ensuite bay with plenty of space and nice facilities.

Did however get eaten alive by bugs. Appeared to live in the fake grass
Excellent park. Super clean and modern.
Very nice place to stay. Quiet, clean facilities
Bon camping les accomodations sont super mais les camps sont un peu entassé.. et les oiseaux c’est un enfer… ne peut pas dormir une nuit complète sans qu’ils crient à 4am dommage
Great location. We booked an ensuite site and that was superb. If it's midge season make sure you get lots of bug spray. They are pretty relentless.

We had an exceptional clean new cabin. We loved our stay there very much. It was our first time staying in a caravan park and definitly will do it again. Awesome facilities and nice food trucks! Loved the quiet pool area and the nice lady at the reception!

Nice CP, amenities clean, was a bit noisy as we were backing onto the road. Coffee truck there every morning and a thai food truck a couple of nights. Good location close to town. We jetskiid one day, did the mount Rooper circuit another day. Ate at Eastwoods in town and got the courtesy bus to The Northerlies one night. All fantastic. Good bars everywhere, had an afternoon at the Airlie beach hotel listening to a Joe cocker cover band.

Loved all the birds hanging around also

We had our own van very modern clean facilities great camp kitchen lots of different type of sites to to stay on beautiful bird feeding at 4pm every day, fantastic coffee every morning from coffee van on site and lovely lady to serve you, a different hot meals van most nights very helpful and very friendly in the office will be back to Tasman Airlie Beach Dennis and Michelle thanks
Super Campingplatz, sauber, liebevoll ausgebaut, Foodtruck abends ist eine tolle Abwechslung.
Friendly staff, modern clean facilities, good sized van sites.

This is the second time I've stayed in this park first visit everything was great , been away 28 day come back out of 10 washing machine in the park 4 are working and out of 6 dryers 3 are working and as the price to use machine is a premium compared to other parks you would think that they would all be going instead have to roam around to find a machine that's working and not being used, need to fix
We had an ensuite site. Very nice location. Walking distance to shops. Right opposite a pub.
Top huisje, echt value for money.

Leuke camping met nette faciliteiten. Het vogel voeren in de middag en alle vogels op de camping zijn ook leuk. Op verschillende avonden staan er food trucks voor lekker eten. Zeer goed gelegen om diverse trips vanuit te doen.

Wir hatten einen guten Aufenthalt. Leider waren überall « out of order «  Schilder aufgehängt. 80% der Waschmaschinen und Trockner waren defekt, aber auch etliche Toiletten waren kaputt. Wir fanden auch, dass die Sauberkeit hätte besser sein müssen - Mülleimer in den Damentoiletten quollen zum Beispiel über, was sehr unhygienisch war.

Das Personal war sehr freundlich. Die Kinder haben den Spielplatz und die Vogelfütterung geliebt.
Stond op een kampeerplaats met een camper. Geen stroom. Hele nette toiletten, douches en keuken gedeelte.

Eine sehr schöne und sehr saubere Anlage.
Die komplette Anlage,  Campingplatz wie Bungalows,  ist angelegt wie ein privater Garten.
Tolle Lage um die gesamte Region zu erkunden.

Beautiful park! All over clean!
Price performance absolutely great.

Our experience was awful with the cabin we were allocated.  We paid $270 per night for this awful cabin. Cabin No 55. The cabin was old and dirty.  Before we could do anything, we had to clean the sink, taps, door handles, scrub the dining room table as it was so sticky.  Clean the table on the front verandah before we could sit out there. Floors were gritty with sand and dirty and we had started not wearing shoes but soon realised our feet were getting black from the dirt off the floor.  Curtains were so dusty, it created asthma and sinusitis with both my husband and me.  The stove top did not work properly, so we had the maintenance man come and look.  Went to use the oven which was also dirty.  The maintenance man was very good and reported the stove top the next day and a new stove top was installed.  The door lock was broken and, had there been a fire, we would have had trouble getting out.  Holes in the flywire screen front door.  Shower dirty.  Venetian blinds in both the bathroom and the kitchen were dirty.  Walls very dirty.  Remote was so sticky and dirty, we had to wipe it several times to get it working.  After all those attempts, the remote was still hard to use.  The dust on top of the microwave was thick enough for us to write "wipe me" on top of it!  Overall, I would not recommend staying in a cabin in this park. I spoke to Sarah at reception, who wrote down all these complaints and said she had passed them on to the Cleaning Manager and would get back to me with the result.  So far, we have heard nothing.

Friendly service. Clean amenities. Brand new BBQ area is great! Plenty of lovely shady trees and surroundings. Very close drive to Airlie Beach main street precinct. Animals very welcome. Wood-fired pizza food truck had delicious pizzas. Tavern bottle shop across the road was very handy. We had a relaxing stay. Highly recommend
Clean and tidy but extremely expensive.
We spent a beautiful week in a quiet and relaxing place, everything was very clean and a good management service, thank you ☺️

Just amazing
Staff are very friendly and helpful.
They had bird feeding every day at 4pm was amazing. Park is very clean and tidy. Beautiful place, can’t wait to go back.
Arrived for our booked site after midnight and it was already occupied. The place has no security at all… can’t recommend

2nd time we have stayed here.. great location 👌 walking distance to the harbour , coffee shops and restaurants.  Nice clean facilities,  we had a powered ensuite site.. lovely... nice pool area ...  what more could you want ☺️

Un des caravan parks les plus proche du centre d’Airlie Beach. Jolis emplacements avec beaucoup de végétation et très bien entretenus. Les toilettes/douches étaient toujours propres. Un arrêt de bus se trouve à 3min du parc. Je recommande sans hésiter !

This was a great place to stay in our motor home lovely tropical atmosphere, friendly staff, clean amenities, great swimming pool. Could not fault this park. Even feeding of the birds in the afternoon. Just beautiful.

Nice enough park ..we booked sites last year 2023 so we could have large enough sites for motorhomes with slideouts and made it clear we needed the room to set up. I know sites aren't guaranteed however, our sites were changed because people on them wanted to extend their stay, we had barely enough room but both vans on those sites were small enough to be moved. Was very muddy (no one to blame here) but we kindly asked for some gravel to be placed in watery ruts but never happened, never saw a staff member in the 4 days there. Might try another park next time
Beautiful caravanpark in a beautiful spot
Los baños y el lugar lo mejor

Hermoso lugar! Limpio, completo y el personal muy amable! El lugar queda cerca caminando del centro y en auto a pocos minutos, tiene opciones de comida en la entrada, pile y música en vivo! Súper recomendable
Brilliant
Best accommodation in Airlie Beach bar none. Booked for 3 nights and got the 4th free. Ended up staying 8 nights. Clean, safe and Dave on Sunday nights.
One of the best places for spending the night that I've been, great amenities, awesome rooms, very clean fully equiped with kitchen, sofa, shower, TV, desk, aircon and more. Congrats 👏 👏

An absolutely beautiful well kept park.  Driveway is a little tight but that would be the only thing bad they have evergreen sites and double slabs which is fantastic. Pet friendly gorgeous glamour tents also food  vans that come to the park Mr whipper and Avery good pub across the road

Excellent park for caravans, campers and chalets. Glamping accommodation is outstanding as is the general upkeep of the facilities. Top notch service and the best price.
Everything you need and only a short walk into center.
Enjoyed our stay but a bit to many people around for us. Camp ground was perfect and the reef and islands were just amazing. A great base to spend time exploring a magical part of the world.
Great camp site with a double slab, close to all of the camp amenities. 5min from town. Perfect.
Great location, unfortunately the park was not full and we were put on a site that backed onto a noisy road. Staff really nice!
Best camp site during our roadtrip - nice tropical vibe. We loved the daily changing food trucks:)!

$35 unpower site
設施蠻多的 冷藏庫 電磁爐足夠
廁所浴室乾淨 空間夠大
價錢值得

We stayed on an ensuite site, we absolutely enjoyed our 2 nights there!
The ensuite bathroom was brand new, the park was very well maintained and all the staff was nice.
The bird feeding was a nice bonus 😊
Gr8  place amenities where gr8 and the park too. Had an ensuite site which was gr8.

Awesome location & facilities.
Were we stayed in 2 bedroom cabin#45 had distinct mould smell throughout.
Awesome staff & even got text about local food van times out front of the park.
Wildlife in abundance.
Toilet was loose, TV remote held together with duct tape,  line light didn't work. Lounge fan speed 1 (lowest) didn't work.
Comfy enough overall.
Toller Campingplatz, saubere Nasszellen, Foodtruckangebot sehr fein.
We had a wonderful stay here in a cabin. Loved the 4 o'clock bird feeding. Nice clean pool. Very efficient check-in process. Overall we were very happy and would stay again.

This is probably a more suitable park for families with young kids than couples as the play area and bird feeding seem lovely.  We booked as we needed a place to park our boat trailer as well. The garden cabin seemed to be the largest cabin on booking, yet was so pokey it was claustrophobic. Yet the cabin price is similar to much, much nicer apartments. Stingy on space, broad shoulders would touch the sides in the shower, the couch barely fit two average adults, and stingy on amenities like cutlery (only 2 of everything). Attacked by mossies to the point of despair, so we left a night early and copped the loss.  For a comparable price you can get a gorgeous apartment with stunning views on the hills overlooking airlie beach… with no midgies, and the lounge size will be the same as this entire cabin. Trailer storage is cheap so do yourself a favour and find a nicer apartment like we did and store your trailer elsewhere.

Tasman is always a good choice to stay. We've been in Rowes Bay before and was a pleasant experience.
The rooms are good sized, comfy, bed is nice. They have a kitchen facilitie w/ sink, microwave and kettle.
The parks are really well maintained and in airlie they have the bird feeding so lots of parrots come on time to feed.

This time we only got a issue with aircon, that made our bedroom just less warm, but not really chilled and comfortable and the TV that was having a kind of delay, took long to turn on and open Netflix and I couldn't watch the movie as it was freezing every few minutes.

Anyway, I highly recommend Tasman.

Lovely modern cabin with good facilities, nice pool although quite close to the road. Our cabin sadly has the air con situated in the living area, not the bedroom, and is under powered, meaning it got quite hot at night. Yet again another Tasman HP with virtually no internet, even if you do manage to connect it’s useless. It’s the only factor stopping Tasman HP getting a 5 star from me! In 2024 we travellers expect internet (was also unable to get 4g here).

Sanitaire au top... Camping bien placé et quelques activités sympathiques à noter en plus des piscines et du terrain de tennis. Cependant les nuits peuvent être courtes en raison de beaucoup de bruit de la part des oiseaux à TOUTES heures.

Super clean et super personnel!
L'endroit est calme et chaque emplacement est très bien délimité! Le douches et espaces communs sont très propres/nickel !
Petit plus, les food trucks qui viennent a l'entrée du camping le soir pour un prix très raisonnable!

Nette Unterkunft mit Küche (Mikro, Herd, Kühlschrank und Tiefkühler). Auto kann man direkt neben seiner Hütte unter dem Carport parken. WLAN in der Hütte leider nicht vorhanden. Doppelbett leider etwas klein.

Un parc super en terme d’accueil tout d’abord : la dame de la réception est un amour. De la joie de vivre et un sens poussé de la relation client, eĺle s’est  occupée de notre réservation pour le survol de la Grande Barrière de corail. Nous étions de passage pour 2 nuits dans le cadre de notre road trip sur la côte est australienne. L’emplacement pour notre camping-car et les équipements parfaits, la piscine propre. Et les oiseaux sauvages qui débarquent à 16 h pour se faire nourrir : juste un spectacle merveilleux. WI-FI qui fonctionnait. C’est à une trentaine de minutes de marche du centre d’Airlie, sinon taxi à 10 dollars australiens (6 euros).
Well sized motel rooms, very tidy with plenty of amenities. Pool, playground and jumping castle. Onsite parking. Had a wonderful stay!

Wow! Nous avons adoré notre séjour de 2 nuits à cet endroit. Lorsque nous sommes arrivés, un des membres de l'équipe nourrissait des perroquets et nous a permis de vivre l'expérience. Devant notre cabine plusieurs oiseaux nous attendaient pour nous saluer. Les enfants ont adoré! La proximité de la ville en fait un emplacement de choix! Sans compter la piscine et le parc pour enfants! Personnel super souriant à notre arrivée et vraiment gentil. Le seul hic est le Wifi qui ne se rend pas bien sur le site. En soirée, il est difficile d'avoir accès à internet et comme nous avions besoin de continuer à organiser notre périple pendant le dodo des enfants, c'était un gros manque pour nous.
Bellissimo campeggio vicino a Airlie Beach alla quale è collegata dal bus a 10 minuti. Il campeggio è tenuto benissimo e la receptionist è davvero gentile e sempre molto simpatica. Spero di tornarci.

Fantastic staff, couldn’t be more helpful. Food van options for dinner. Easy walk to town. Pet friendly. Only issue has been with the amenities-they haven’t been cleaned much during our stay. We can get over that - looking forward to our return.

Beautiful clean friendly outdoor kitchen amenities have microwave induction cookers bbq fridge freezer.  Bathrooms really clean. Beautiful pool. We have a rooftop so we stayed firstly at a powered water site. But moved across to an ensuite site for like  not much more. Brad knew and easy for us.
Highly recommend
Lovely spot to stay on our Camper van trip
Clean, well kept Holiday Park! Would definitely recommend. Keep up the good work.

Wir verbrachten eine Nacht im Glamping-Zelt. War ein sehr cooles Erlebnis!
Auch die Vogelfütterung um 4 können wir SEHR empfehlen! (Achtung: Die Krallen der Vögel können etwas weh tun.)
Wir würden def. wieder kommen!

Good quality, great price and helpful staff. 😍
Also, not that far from the city center

Had one night here as travelling to Townsville, the accommodation in the one bedroom villa was beautiful better than any five star hotel room. Great tavern across the road that had delicious food at affordable prices
Accommodation was clean and tidy , location was good
We loved this campsite, good location, we took a walk to Airlie beach, the people at reception were very kind with our washing machine problem. The BBQ zone incredible. Totally recommended!

What an awesome place to stay. The cabin we had was immaculate! Reception were very welcoming. Laundry facilities perfect. Location, away from the hustle and bustle. The park has bird feeding in the afternoon which was a hit. Had a swim and chilled in the very well maintained pool. Perfect spot for a family getaway. Definitely coming back here when visiting the Whitsunday.
Thanks for a fabulous stay 👍😊

Absolutely amazing will recommend to everyone I know. Great location and amazing powered sites.
Sarah at the front counter is absolutely amazing and extremely helpful. Will definitely be back again
Great park with great amenities. Stayed 10 days and loved it

Popped in without a booking ( not recommended 🤣) the friendly ladies at the front desk were amazing, especially given it’s just before Christmas.
Beautiful park, amenities are amazing, bathrooms are cleaned multiple times a day so always spotless, laundry’s are large and spotless, camp kitchens just amazing with everything you could imagine, pool is great.
Honestly can’t fault this place.
Definitely will be back. Brand new facilities. Nicely done up. Beautiful BBQ are and lovely friendly staff. Nothing to dislike.

We had a great albeit short stay at Tasman Holiday Parks, the pool was lovely during this hot day and the room was spacious. And also the cheapest prices around at that time of year!

I would like to specifically thank Kaz for being amazing with the items I forgot there - IDs and electronics, no less. She was super responsive and helped me organise shipping and sent my stuff back. What a relief!

Will definitely book there again when we're travelling back this way!
Best place for family....

Wir haben unseren Aufenthalt im Tasman Holiday Parks - Airlie Beach sehr genossen. Der Campingplatz ist sehr schön und gepflegt, die Einrichtungen sind modern und sauber und der Service ist hervorragend. Die Mitarbeiterinnen im Frontoffice sind sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend.
Ein besonderes Erlebnis war die Vogelfütterung, die jeden Tag stattfindet. Wir waren begeistert von den vielen bunten Vögeln, die uns aus der Hand gefressen haben.
Wir können diesen Campingplatz weiterempfehlen.

The staff working there was nice, but the manager was so rude to us. We booked two nights, but one of the staff gave us money back for the last night after we told them that their WiFi didn’t work at all and no signal, so we had to book another camp for the last night (we are remote workers and need signal/wifi).
They decided to charge us after all and did that without talking to us in advance. They literally took money from my bank account without permission. We called the manager and I have never met a person as disrespectful, rude and not service minded at all. We told her that her attitude was not ok and that we will write a bad review for the place. Her words were “ooh no I’m so worried” in a sarcastic way. I can’t believe how unprofessional she was to us.
Very nice
Beautiful campsite! Lots of bird flying around because they feed the birds at 4 pm. There is a food truck every evening and a breakfast  take away every morning. Amenities were very clean.
Eines der besten Camping Plätze überhaupt. Liegt nur zu weit von der City weg. Mit Bus geht's, spät abends wird's schwierig

Fantastic place to stay !
It's a little slice of heaven, super relaxing and close to everything. The staff where super accommodating. Would highly recommend 👌 we will be back

Great value!! Very comfortable accommodation at an affordable price for all types of travellers.
The amenities were super clean and wide(especially the public showers in which you often struggle not to wet your clothes).
Swimming pool, BBQ area and a nice park where you can feed the birds.
About 15-20min walk from the city centre.
Nice staff as well.
Highly recommend and would definitely be back in ever in Airlie again!
Great Service & nice place to stay in Airlie Beach.
This is a fantastic place to stay the people are lovely the staff are amazing the facilities are five star would recommend it to anyone

Siamo stati molto bene in questo camping le piazzole sono ampie e pulite come pure i servizi igienici e la zona lavanderia, il campeggio dista 10 minuti dal centro ma vi sono un caffè mobile e un furgoncino con cibo take away proprio di fronte, lo consiglio personale molto gentile !
Friendly staff. Great service. Great rooms. Parking was great 👍.

We stayed in a motel room with our kids and the LOVED it we were inbetween the playground and pool. Great location to come with kids and they have food trucks every night out the front and coffee truck out the front in mornings which serve up a decent coffee  and thats coming from melbournians

We had a great time at this Campground.
I would always come back!
Loved the pool area 🏊🌞

Pas une super expérience. Emplacement pour campervan.
Wifi quasiment inexistant.
Odeurs de canabis du matin au soir
Extrêmement sale : cuisines dégoûtantes, sanitaires vraiment sales, crottes de chien sur notre emplacement…
Aucune ombre et aucune arbre sur notre premier emplacement (nous en avons eu 2 différents)
Seule la situation géographique est un bon point : à 10 min à pied du port d’airlie Beach
Very good easy to get a round clean

I first fell in love with tasman parks with the one in Fraser Coast. That one made us decide to stay in this one. And it seems as if it has been the best decision during our whole holidays. The staff has been nothing but helpful and extremely lovely, especially Kaz, Sarah and two other lovely (blonde) ladys whose names I unfortunately don't know. Especially Kaz is someone we truly can't thank enough!!!!! We weren't the easiest guests since we had a huge problem with our campervan and because of that things changed very spontaneously and multiple times, but everyone did their absolute best to help. I've never come across any holiday accommodation before with staff being this friendly and kind-hearted.
Even though it was super stressful because of the campervan, we always had a smile on our face because of the lovely staff.

The park itself is quite a gem with pool, bird feeding every day, a different food truck every evening, the bus stop right around the corner and lots of big trees. If you stay in a cabin, pretty much every single one will be nice to stay in. If you stay on a campsite, there's plenty of things to use, fridge with freezer, laundry, full equipped outdoor kitchen and more. There's a newly built Block with toilets and showers. You see the cleaning staff very often during the day which means everything is well taken care of.

Thank you guys for making this stay so beautiful despite the difficult circumstances!!!
This has to be the nicest campground, especially the staff. Thank you for making our stay so enjoyable.
Super helpful, friendly and happy staff. Had all the facilities I needed. Was quiet and peaceful. Thank you 😊

We stayed one night on an unpowered site. The site was tiny very close to the neighbours. No privacy at all. No shade on the site. The camping is close to the road with a lot of traffic. We'll never come back.
Really nice place to stay in Airlie Beach. Close to town without being in town. Good coffee right at the door, clean toilets.
Wifi didn’t work, Netflix didn’t work, pretty damn diss appointed with our stay.

Great place , not very close to downtown, about 25 min walk
Campsite are relatively small , you need to choose a good one
You can't have here much privacy
Very good park and amenities. Well located. Welcoming and helpful staff.
We stayed in our caravan. Such a beautiful tropical location.

Nice clean amenities.
Very friendly team.
Expected the dozens of curlews to keep us awake, but they must have gone elsewhere to party.
Our site was close to the road, but we didn't notice any road noise at all. It is tucked away.

Had a great surprise holiday with Adventure Allstars.I shared a self contained cabin with four other women.I was more than happy to use the shower and toilet block facilities daily. They were beautifully maintained and modern.Always had hot water and plenty of space at the generous bathroom vanity area.
Great location and easy transport
Highly recommend.Ive stayed in plenty of Parks and this one was awesome.
Highly recommend for families also.Lots for the children to do..

Toilet and showers spotless , bus right outside so easy to jump on down to main part of airlie beach . Tours all do pick ups . Camper van with three kids and was perfect for jumping off to Whitsundays . Nice pool , play park and fun big bouncy pillow . Kids loved feeding the birds too .
Great location, caravan park a bit squeezy.
Lovely park , staff were very helpful & friendly, only just found sites are very small not much room to move.

Fantastic stay at the beautiful Tasman Holiday Park at Airlie Beach, Queensland.
Can not recommend this place highly enough, exceptional facilities, professionaly run and friendly staff.
Coffee van arrives every morning for that great start to the day and a variety of food vans every night for those wishing to stay in and enjoy the park.
Managers Steven and Lyn made sure our stay in one of the superb Glamping tents was a very special occasion.
Look forward to staying again when we are next in Airlie Beach
Les and Angela  Marrable and Suzanne and Warren Williams

Tasman Parks is a quaintly serene tropical hideout, within a reasonable 2km walk to the foreshore. The villas have all the amenities you need, despite the bunk rooms being a bit tight on space for adult-sized humans (perfect for a family with kids) as the double/queen rooms that adjoin them are adequately sized with cupboard storage. Some new glamping tents up the back look impressive and the campgrounds/bbq area is welcoming & tidy, very family friendly. Particularly pleased by the fresh newly built & clean state of the communal bathroom blocks too.

Tasman Holiday Park - Airlie Beach was such a nice play to stay. Very well kept inside the cabins and around the grounds. Different food trucks stop at the front of the park for variety in dinners and a lovely coffee van each morning for a few hours. Definitely suitable for families with children of all ages with pool, playground and plenty of communal toilets and showers.
Great location for families or even if you are in a caravan. Located close to Airlie beach centre, the harbour & amazing restaurants.

Had a great 4 nights here, The Bird feeding at 4pm every day was great.
Amenities we're spotless.
But I wasn't impressed with the site I was given 108 right next to a cabin.
Loved our stay here! Nice amenities, staff and decent space for a camper trailer

Fantastic Van park that accommodates for people of all ages, plenty to do for the kids and the evening foods vans are a treat.
The Glamping tents are amazing, can accommodate a family of 6 with double bunks either side of the tent, highly recommend booking yourself one of these.

Those places are a delight if you're allowed to park your mobile home next to or on to a concrete slapped spot. We had one for the first night but had to move the next day in between bushes. Because it started raining we had all the dirt and mess in our motor home. The toilets are clean but could get a bit of maintenance and a clean in-between. The staff there is amazing and very sweet. Love the food and coffee van's coming every day.
However, it was for us as first campers with an exchange student from France, a very nice experience and we will still come back. The toilets are mostly not clean because of messy campers, not because of the staff.

קראוון פארק חמוד מאוד ! מצאנו דיל באתר שלהם שלילה רביעי בחינם! יוצא ממש משתלם!
יש דוכן קפה בכניסה כל בוקר! ובערבים יש פוד טראקים מתחלפים! בזמן שאנחנו כאן יש פיצות בתנור אבן, רוסט ביף ודאמפלינג קוריאני! כל יום בשעה 4 יש האכלה של תוכים! יש בריכה ומתנפחים
מטבח חמוד מאוד, יש אפילו טוסטר אובן
הוייפיי קצת מקרטע אבל סך הכל קראוון פארק חמוד מאוד!

Caravan Park is very cute! We found a deal on their website that the 4th night is free! Turns out really worthwhile!
There is a coffee stand at the entrance every morning! And in the evenings there are changing food tracks! While we're here there are stone oven pizzas, roast beef and Korean dumplings! Every day at 4 o'clock there is parrot feeding! There is a pool and inflatables
Very cute kitchen, there is even a toaster oven
The wifi is a bit faltering but overall the caravan park is very cute!
Haven’t stayed here yet but the service sitting making my booking has been so good that I had to rate it 🤩
Very nice stay....loved the pool.

We love this park. It's our go to in Airlie Beach. Friendly staff. Clean camp kitchens & bathrooms. Well maintained & a cruisy walk to town. We use the unpowered or powered sites & there is enough room without feeling squished.

Glamping tents are next level fun experience. Heaps of room for a family of 6 with decent fridge and dishwasher.  Easy relaxing way to enjoy Airlie Beach.  Food trucks also on site every evening. Well done to great staff.

This was our first caravan park on our lap around Australia (@lapwithnomap on IG) and we loved our stay! Such a treat to have clean showers & facilities. Everyone there was super lovely. Kitchen was very clean as well.

Cabins would be great for families staying in Airlie Beach. They have all amenities required for a comfortable stay.
Great kids area with large inflatable jumping pillow. Clean and tidy.
Fun place
Fantastic caravan park with nice amenities & sites.
Lovely caravan park Food trucks every night Amenities so clean and spacious Manager and staff very friendly and helpful Definitely recommend
Nice site ,seems to be used for workers,very clean facilities.bit to close to main road for me,but what can you do,staff very friendly.
Absolute must stay, clean friendly and bird feeding at 4pm daily a must see.
